[]: Evangelion Fonts             Quote Post by Ongekibou » Tue Dec 15, 2009 9:32 am So, I'm doing a personal fan project for Eva, and I need to know the font used for English text in the opening (y'know, when "UNIT 01", "TEST UNIT", "SECOND IMPACT" and all that show up). I'm using Photoshop, so any spacing settings would be great too. Thanks to all that can help.
